last it is due to wild animals, wild elephants, (Snake), or a jungle
horde. (10) In the first of Cancer it is due to crocodile, liquor,
thorn, or somnambulism. (II) In the 2nd it is due to a blow,
poisoning etc. (12) In the last it is due to birds, venereal
diseases, tumour, blood pressure or poisoning or general lassitude.
(13) In the first of Leo it is by water, poison or foot-disease.
(14) In the second by dropsy or diarrhoea or in a forest. (15)
In the last by poison, weapon, curse or a fall. (16) In the first
of Virgo it is by cerebral disease or vitiation of wind. (17) In
the 2nd by a wild elephant or snake, in a fortress, forest or
from a prince. (IS) In the last by camel, donkey, weapon,
water, deep chasm or by food served by a woman: (19) in the
I si of Libra by a young woman, quadruped or fall from a height;
